name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Happy New Year
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=1)
---
| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=2)
| |
---
\- January 1st, 2016 -
Happy New Year!
| Dear Peter, Happy New Year! 2016 is going to be an amazing year and with your support, we will make this nation better and stronger than ever before. I look forward to continuing to share my vision for this country. We are going to secure our borders, strengthen our military, take care of our brave veterans, build a thriving economy, create jobs, rebuild infrastructure and most importantly, keep our country and your families safe.
This next month is filled with campaign events and rallies, and we hope you will be able to join us! Our first stop of the New Year will be tomorrow night in [Biloxi, Mississippi](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftrumpbiloxi.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=3). On Monday, I will be in [Lowell, Massachusetts](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftrumplowell.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=4); Tuesday we are visiting [Claremont, New Hampshire](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftrumpclaremont.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=5); Thursday I will be in [Burlington, Vermont](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftrumpvermont.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=6) and on Friday we will be in [Rock Hill, South Carolina](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftrumprockhill.eventbrite.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newyears_appr2&n=7) \- I hope to see you there.
We wish you and your loved ones a Happy New Year. 2016 is just the beginning of our journey to Make America Great Again! Sincerely, Donald J. Trump
---
| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: We're Positioned to Win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT [www
body:
Courageous Conservatives \- Reigniting the Promise of America
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640811:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
**Hello Friend,**
Here we are -- 2016! I hope your new year is off to a fantastic start and you're fired up about electing Ted to be our next president _**this year**_! To start off 2016, I wanted to share a note with you that I sent to our staff just a few days ago that highlights what we've accomplished together since launching the campaign at Liberty University on March 23rd:
**Financial strength:**
* We concluded 2015 raising **almost $47 million**.
* Our Super PACs have been reported to be the second best funded of the GOP field.
* We received over **690,000 donations** with an **average donation of just over $67**.
* These donors cover **66% of all zip codes** in the United States.
* Over **10,000 of our donors are "sustainers"** who committed to contribute on an automatic, monthly basis, and provide enough recurring revenue (**$500,000 a month**) to fund for our entire field operation.

**An unrivaled political organization:**
Emphasizing our commitment to running a national campaign, we have announced State Leadership Teams, **1,400 strong in membership** , in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada, Georgia, Alabama, Arkansas, North Carolina, New Jersey, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Virginia, Mississippi, Minnesota, Florida, Arizona, Michigan, and Washington. We've also announced State Chairs in Massachusetts, Pennsylvania, Wyoming, Idaho, and California.
In the first four primary and caucus states: Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada, we've built a team that is the envy of the GOP field with **county chairmen in place in all 171 counties**. And after the first four states, we have **congressional district coordinators** in place in each of the **163 congressional districts that comprise the 24 states** that hold their primary or caucus before March 15th. We are also actively recruiting precinct chairmen to serve in each of these states to mobilize supporters as it comes time to vote or caucus.
Additionally, our leadership teams have access to **over 175,000 volunteers** across the nation who have signed up to help make Ted Cruz our next president. Many of those volunteers have already joined our Strike Force at Camp Cruz where we are housing our volunteers in Iowa. They are working 12 hour shifts and exceeding their nightly call and door-knocking goals. Camp Cruz has been such a great success we're opening a second dorm to expand our Strike Force in Iowa, and we will be taking the Strike Force to New Hampshire.
We're also recruiting members of diverse coalitions to support Ted. To date, **over 29,000 Americans from all walks of life have signed up to join our Veterans and Military, Millennials, Teens, Liberty Leaders, African Americans, Small Business, Faith Leaders, Pro-Life, Women, Hispanic, Home Schoolers, Lawyers, Second Amendment, Tea Party, Sportsmen, and Farmers coalitions**.
**Coalescing Courageous Conservatives:**
Recently, Brent Bozell [wrote](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640812:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r) in _Breitbart_ to say, "Ted Cruz is surging. He's on top in Iowa. He's gaining ground everywhere else. He has organizations in place in every state that matters... It's time for the movement to rally around Ted Cruz, to make him the next president of the United States."
And that's exactly what we're seeing happen. We have seen conservative leaders both nationally, and in early primary and caucus states go all in for Ted. Leaders like Brent Bozell, Shane Vander Haart, Manny Roman, Ken Cuccinelli, Dr. James Dobson, the National Organization for Marriage, Bob Vander Plaats, Alan Steinberg, Richard Viguerie, Andrew McCarthy, Ann-Marie Murrell, Troy Newman, Ginni Thomas, Rep. Steve King, Dr. Michael Brown, Judge Paul Pressler, former Rep. Bob Barr, Gun Owners of America, the National Federation of Republican Assemblies, Ron Robinson, Rep. Jim Bridenstine, and so many more.
As influential Iowa radio host Steve Deace said in his endorsement video "**I think [Ted Cruz] is our best chance to preserve American exceptionalism for the next generation... do not wait until the end.** Ted Cruz has already put together the resources, the resume and the organization it takes to move the country back to liberty. Let's get on board now, let's unite now so that we can take on Washington, D.C. tomorrow."
**What the press is saying about our campaign:**
Cruz has Trump, and the rest of the field, beat on organization. - [_Politico_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640813:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Ted Cruz has assembled an impressive presidential campaign structure in Iowa, veteran political observers here say, with one going so far as to describe Cruz's campaign as perhaps "the most sophisticated" the first-in-the-nation caucus state has ever witnessed. - [_Cedar Rapids Gazette_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640814:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Republican presidential candidate Ted Cruz is making a big bet on building a strong organization outside of the four early voting states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada. - [_Nashville Public Radio_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640815:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Cruz is widely regarded as the most deeply organized candidate in the South, a region that will have outsize influence in 2016, as many of the states vote on the same day. - [_Politico_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640816:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
The Cruz campaign combines a traditional get-out-the-vote operation -- making phone calls and knocking on doors -- with modern data analytics to identify and mobilize supporters, beginning with Iowa on Feb. 1. - [_Associated Press_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640817:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
The anti-establishment angst that Cruz stokes may have left him isolated in the Senate, but it has also fueled his campaign on the road, where he has cultivated an almost cult-like base that views him as a lone wolf with the courage to stand up to Republican Party leaders they believe are no longer fighting for them. - [_Bloomberg_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640818:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
**The months ahead:**
Some campaigns are focused solely on a man, some on a movement. Ours is a hybrid of the two built to win. We have brought together, and continue to build, a grassroots army of courageous conservatives committed to electing Ted Cruz to reignite the promise of America. Just under a month away from the start of the caucuses and primaries we have a network in place with the resources required to win that is the envy of every other campaign.
There's still plenty of work to be done to make Ted the Republican nominee and the next President, but as we begin 2016, we are exactly where we want to be. Go. Fight. Win.
**This is OUR time!**
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**
P.S. On Monday, we kick off the #CruzinToCaucus Bus Tour in Iowa. If you're in the area, we hope you'll join us. **[Click here to find out where you can meet Ted and to RSVP](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640819:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)**.
# Press Clips
Ted Cruz's Fundraising Jumps in 4th Quarter
[Wall Street Journal](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640820:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
At Trump South Carolina rally, rival Cruz casts long shadow
[Reuters](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640821:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Ted Cruz tours North Texas tornado damage
[WFAA](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640822:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Cruz returns to Iowa with bus tour Monday
[Associated Press](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640823:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Cruz Courts Christians at Faith Gathering
[TIME](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640824:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Ted Cruz continues Lone Star stop with West Texas rally
[Dallas Morning News](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640825:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)

[NBC News](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640826:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)

[PJ Media](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640827:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
New Ted Cruz Ad Puts Focus on Religious Liberty
[Caffeinated Thoughts](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640828:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Tony Dolan on Max Boot on Ted Cruz
[Commentary](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640829:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Cruz is Playing the Media Perfectly
[National Review](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640830:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Why the Establishment Fears Cruz More than Trump
[Conservative Review](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640831:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Ad: Ted Cruz 'Defended the cross -- and won.'
[Washington Examiner](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640832:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
YouGov: Head to head, Rubio now trails Trump by eight and Cruz by 18
[Hot Air](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640833:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
House rebels crusade for Cruz
[Politico](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640834:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Cruz taps evangelicals, tea partiers to fuel campaign
[Associated Press](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640817:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
I Endorse Ted Cruz for President
[Caffeinated Thoughts](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640835:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)
Cruz in control in Iowa
[Cedar Rapids Gazette](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32640814:sYS3gMyNJ:m:1:1104269936:6B30409A278ED6CDB90AC6370A1A2524:r)

There's still plenty of work to be done to make Ted the Republican nominee and the next President, but as we begin 2016, we are exactly where we want to be. Go. Fight. Win. This is OUR time! Jeff Roe Campaign Manager Cruz for President P.S. On Monday, we kick off the #CruzinToCaucus Bus Tour in Iowa. If you're in the area, we hope you'll join us. . name: Jeb Bush
subject: This is it
body:
This is it, Friend.

The 2016 election year is officially upon us, and Iowans vote in just 30 days. The fight to take back the White House starts right now with you.

**Because you were such an important member of our team in 2015, I need you again.

[ Please become one of the first 2016 Founding Members of this campaign by contributing just $1 right now.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/atlzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcdpbmk_rvtggwlj.html)**

**Our team calculated it, and we need 10,000 2016 Founding Members in order to fund our efforts over the next thirty days before Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hhmrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdbwnvb_rvtggwlj.html)
When you become a 2016 Founding Member, your money will go directly to advertising, field operations, campaign materials and orchestrating the most ambitious Get-Out-The-Vote operation of all the campaigns.

More than that though, this is about knowing you have my back in the crucial days that lay ahead.

**Friend , if I can count on you, please contribute just $1 and become a 2016 Founding Member now:**

[**Jeb2016.com/2016-Founding-Member/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hhhrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdbwnvs_rvtggwlj.html)

Because of you, we'll start 2016 prepared to win.

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/sskfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgvkjbm_rvtggwlj.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=7049&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32641852:Wbsiszy_N:m:1:876315805:C901FEC11A1C0622A29C793690419F44:r)
---

Peter,

It is an honor and distinct privilege working with you to restore power back into the hands of "We the People."

Your continued support and presence has made this movement a formidable force. Just recently we ended the 4th fundraising quarter with a most notable record of $23 million raised.

This is the most of any campaign.

We also have the most contributors to date, and we continue to grow. We won't stop here.

As we enter a new phase of the campaign cycle, you will notice an invigorated campaign strategy that more aggressively shares my vision and worldview with the American people.

Over a year ago, hundreds of thousands of Americans encouraged me to listen to the call and seek the office of President of the greatest nation the world has ever known.

I want to lead this country with you -- I am ready to be President and believe that my unique experience and background is what is needed to heal, inspire and revive America.
Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32641852:Wbsiszy_N:m:1:876315805:C901FEC11A1C0622A29C793690419F44:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32641853:Wbsiszy_N:m:1:876315805:C901FEC11A1C0622A29C793690419F44:r)
